walking_stick.name: walking stick
walking_stick.description: A sturdy wooden walking stick -- it eases a long march, and at a pinch it's a better cudgel than bare fists.

thorin_map.name: old map
thorin_map.description: A well-worn map of the Wilderland, marking the road east to the Lonely Mountain. A note in the corner mentions moon-letters on the back, readable only by the same moon and season under which they were written -- you'd need to find somewhere suitably moonlit to make them out.

torch.name: torch
torch.description: An unlit torch. Light it before venturing into the dark.

sting.name: Sting
sting.description: A small elvish blade that glows blue when goblins or orcs are near.

orcrist.name: Orcrist
orcrist.description: Thorin's ancient elvish blade, known to goblins as 'Biter'.

glamdring.name: Glamdring
glamdring.description: Gandalf's sword, known to goblins as 'Beater'.

ring.name: plain gold ring
ring.description: A small, plain gold ring. It feels strangely warm.

key_troll_cave.name: iron key
key_troll_cave.description: A large rusty iron key taken from a troll.

key_goblin_cell.name: goblin cell key
key_goblin_cell.description: A crude iron key stripped from the goblin captain.

moon_key.name: moon-letter key
moon_key.description: A slim silver key, its grip etched with moon-letters only visible by moonlight.

bread.name: loaf of bread
bread.description: A fresh loaf of Shire bread.

elvish_bread.name: waybread
elvish_bread.description: Rivendell's waybread -- one cake sustains a traveller through a long day's march, and it keeps for months in the pack.

cram.name: cake of cram
cram.description: A dry, filling traveller's cake favored by the Lake-men. Not very tasty.

gold_coins_small.name: small pile of gold coins
gold_coins_small.description: A modest pile of gold coins, plunder from the trolls' hoard.

rope.name: coil of rope
rope.description: A sturdy coil of rope, useful for climbing.

black_arrow.name: black arrow
black_arrow.description: A huge black arrow, passed down through generations of Bard's family.

arkenstone.name: the Arkenstone
arkenstone.description: A great white gem that shines with its own inner light -- the Heart of the Mountain.

gold_goblet.name: golden goblet
gold_goblet.description: An ornate golden goblet from the dwarves' ancient hoard.

treasure_hoard.name: heap of treasure
treasure_hoard.description: A vast heap of gold, gems, and ancient dwarven armor -- Smaug's stolen hoard.

mithril_coat.name: mithril coat
mithril_coat.description: A shirt of mail, its rings wrought of true-silver -- mithril -- light as a feather and hard as dragon scales.

elven_cake.name: elven cake
elven_cake.description: A pale honey-cake of the Wood-elves, light as a leaf and sweeter than anything that ever came out of a hobbit's oven.

elven_cellar_key.name: carved elven key
elven_cellar_key.description: A slender key of white wood, carved with leaves. The butler of the Elvenking keeps its like on his belt -- this one opens the wine cellars.
